title: ononis natrix subsp. inaequalifolia
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. inaequalifolia, also known as the broad-leaved spiny restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, gout, and urinary tract infections. The broad-leaved spiny restharrow has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving kidney function, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
